FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.45sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7ff229fa7a00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464371690 {

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464457570 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464481702 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464482684 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464498007 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464498718 if (!missing(bg))

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464513510 if (!missing(fg))

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464528062 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464541743 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464542484 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464558078 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464630037 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464630457 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464644178 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464658414 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464688435 "default"))

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464784510 }

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464457150 new$version <- version
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464457570 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464481702 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464482684 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464498007 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464498718 if (!missing(bg))

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464541743 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464542484 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464558078 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464558879 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464630037 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464630457 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464644178 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464658414 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464688435 "default"))
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464698750 old$encoding <- enc

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464784510 }

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464830640 domain = NA)
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464831061 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/10 00:25:02.464840695 }

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464851532 }

2026/07/10 00:25:02.464980847 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/07/10 00:25:03.790327408 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790342090 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790380969 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790381880 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790403012 {
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790404114 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790423013 new <- list()
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790429843 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790446278 new$width <- width
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790447089 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790473118 new$height <- height
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790473820 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790486929 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790487340 if (!missing(title))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790503084 new$title <- title
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790506058 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790519989 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790520771 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790534041 new$version <- version
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790534722 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790546469 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790546930 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790556495 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790556925 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790571557 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790572218 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790584978 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790585699 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790597326 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790603986 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790618238 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790619019 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790640241 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790641183 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790657147 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790657848 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790673582 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790674313 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790688664 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790689335 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790702495 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790703176 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790717799 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790718399 if (!missing(producer))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790734854 new$producer <- producer
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790735535 if (!missing(author))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790745005 new$author <- author
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790768666 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790823839 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790825331 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790840469 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790850930 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790851701 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790885312 "default"))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790886133 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790900024 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790902598 }
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790916519 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790917290 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790932558 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790941757 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790942428 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790956940 }
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790957381 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790966585 }
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790967015 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790976049 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790976490 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790991342 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/10 00:25:03.790992063 domain = NA)
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791005639 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791015534 }
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791061904 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791062735 old$family <- family
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791113292 }
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791114333 version <- old$version
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791125370 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791125891 "2.0")
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791135265 if (version %in% versions)
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791135716 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791165030 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791165841 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791181926 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791182797 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791196217 domain = NA)
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791196648 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791207614 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791208095 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/10 00:25:03.791220744 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
